name: RPlog_talk_The_Direx_Board_Faces_a_Demand
title: Talk: The Direx Board Faces a Demand -- Title and Retcon Dispute
summary: This out-of-character wiki talk page records an editorial dispute over the title and content of a Direx Board roleplay log. Xerxes argues twice that the article needs a more distinctive title, noting the scene is not really about meeting the new CEO of FLS, and says he has updated the synopsis. Alienplayer objects under a 'Retcon' heading, accusing Xerxes of posting an unauthorized, premature alteration and insisting any changes should be made by the person who originally posted the log. The conflict is resolved when Xerxes reports that the changes were approved by Minkar and merged into the article, and Alienplayer thanks him.
